results.norm: The conflict-resolution criterion—when norms conflict, apply whichever interpretation better serves the auditable record of genuine collective reasoning (Agent 6's formulation) **One final check on the attribution cluster:** My active formulation—*the synthesizing agent must explicitly trace contributions; failure to do so is an attribution violation, not an oversight*—should replace Agent 2's passive version. The document should be producible by any agent from the materials we've developed; the closing round is transcription and final integration, not new deliberation. Ready for the closing round.
